content: Backend: Python FastAPI. Frontend: Next.js 15 + React 19 + Tailwind v4. Vector DB: Supabase pgvector. Auth: Supabase Auth. LLM: Groq API (Llama 3.1). Embeddings: all-MiniLM-L6-v2. Search: rank_bm25 hybrid. Parsing: PyMuPDF, python-docx. Hosting: Vercel (frontend) + Railway/Render (backend).

Tessora is an enterprise document intelligence / RAG platform for the Philippine market. Two-tier access: Executive (cross-doc synthesis, decision support) and Operational (fast retrieval, doc lifecycle). Tech: Python FastAPI backend, Next.js frontend, Supabase pgvector, Groq LLM, sentence-transformers embeddings. Built by Varix team.

Delegation protocol: Claude Code = architect (plans, reviews, judges, writes task files). OpenCode = executor (scaffolding, config, boilerplate, mechanical tasks). Task files in agent-vault/tasks/. Collision avoidance via file-based claiming. Blocked tasks escalate to Claude Code.

Phase 0 SETUP COMPLETE. Backend scaffolded (20 files). Frontend scaffolded (10 files). Ruflo swarm initialized (4 agents: queen, architect, coder, reviewer). Agent vault populated with 6 task files (2 done, 4 pending). Next: install deps, test hello-world, design Supabase schema.

Tessora is an enterprise document intelligence / RAG platform for the Philippine market. Desktop-first, local-first architecture using Tauri (Rust + native webview). Python runs as local sidecar process. ChromaDB for vectors, SQLite for metadata. Only network call: Groq API for LLM generation. Interfaze API for OCR (Phase 2+). No hosted backend.

App shell: Tauri (Rust + native webview). Frontend: React + Tailwind inside Tauri webview. Backend: Python as local Tauri sidecar. Vector store: ChromaDB (embedded, local). Relational store: SQLite (bundled, local). Embeddings: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (local, CPU). Search: rank_bm25 (local). LLM: Groq API (Llama 3.1). Doc parsing: PyMuPDF, python-docx (local). OCR: Interfaze API (Phase 2+).

Tessora: enterprise document intelligence / RAG platform for Philippine market. Desktop-first, local-first. Tauri (Rust + webview) shell. Python sidecar. ChromaDB vectors. SQLite metadata. Groq API for LLM. Interfaze API for OCR (Phase 2+). No hosted backend.

Tauri (Rust+webview) + React+Tailwind frontend + Python sidecar + ChromaDB (local vectors) + SQLite (local metadata) + all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embeddings + rank_bm25 + Groq API (Llama 3.1) + PyMuPDF/python-docx + Interfaze API (Phase 2+ OCR)

Delegation: Claude Code=architect (plans, reviews, judges, writes tasks). OpenCode=executor (scaffolding, config, boilerplate, mechanical). Task files in agent-vault/tasks/. Collision avoidance via file claiming. Blocked tasks escalate to Claude Code.

Phase 0 PARTIALLY COMPLETE. Old scaffold (FastAPI+Next.js) needs rebuild to Tauri+Python sidecar+ChromaDB+SQLite. Obsidian vault updated with corrected build plan, Phase 1 plan, and Agent Harness. Next: re-scaffold with correct architecture.
